audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult, $6.00 per child, to Franklin Park Zoo or to the Stone Zoo. HOURS: Summer hours (April 1st – September 30th): 9 AM – 5 PM weekdays; 9 AM – 6 PM weekends & holidays Winter hours (October 1st - March 31st): 9 AM – 4 PM daily Franklin Park
